name: Launch Dude
short_description: What happens when unstoppable strength meets zero limits?
detailed_description:
Launch Dude

What happens when unstoppable strength meets zero limits? In Launch Dude, you’ll witness the raw power of a bodybuilder with biceps so massive they could rival rocket engines! His mission? To launch an ordinary dude into the sky with a throw so powerful, it defies gravity and sends him soaring toward the stars!

With each launch, push the limits of physics, break records, and see how high your dude can go. Can you pass the clouds, break through the atmosphere, and surpass the Moon? Maybe—just maybe—you’ll go far enough to see Earth from space!

But it won’t be easy! Gravity will fight to pull your dude back down, so you’ll need perfect timing, upgraded throws, and a whole lot of muscle to reach the ultimate heights!

Game Features:

🚀 Distance Tracker – Watch your dude’s altitude climb higher and higher!
🌕 Surpass the Moon – Break past new milestones and push the limits of human strength!
💪 The Strongest Bodybuilder – Witness raw, muscle-powered madness in action!

Think you’ve got what it takes to defy gravity? Flex those muscles, aim for the stars, and LAUNCH DUDE! 🚀💪
